audit_items.proof_trace: Reference leak in error path - do_item_remove(it) only called when it->refcount == 1, but the matching do_item_get() call requires unconditional cleanup regardless of refcount value. All other functions in codebase call do_item_remove() unconditionally to release their reference.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker triggers delta operations on unlinked items with refcount > 1 repeatedly, causing memory references to accumulate and leak, eventually leading to denial of service through memory exhaustion.
